message:
feat(persist): add RDB 64-bit length encoding support

Extend rdb_encode_length with 0x81 prefix path for lengths exceeding
u32::MAX, writing 8-byte big-endian u64. Update rdb_decode_length to
dispatch case 2 on first byte: 0x80 for u32 (5 bytes) vs 0x81 for
u64 (9 bytes), enabling persistence of datasets with more than 4
billion entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
